testcase.name: test_register_new_user

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ('access_token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJlODkzYjQ4MS0zMDk4LTQwOWItYjAwNi1mNjA1NjEwYzc4MDYiLCJleHAiOjE3ODU1MzI4MTJ9.yeMTyiHtupYrfNqZLT7LOD_IXu3sQ0D_7ettrAhHVWE', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'id': 'e893b481-3098-409b-b006-f605610c7806', 'email': 'test_3c173ab3@oto.com', 'full_name': 'Reg Test'}} and 'test_3c173ab3@oto.com' == 'TEST_3c173ab3@oto.com'
- TEST_3c173ab3@oto.com ? ^^^^ + test_3c173ab3@oto.com ? ^^^^)

testcase.failure: tests/test_oto_ekspertiz.py:38: in test_register_new_user assert "access_token" in data and data["user"]["email"] == email E AssertionError: assert ('access_token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJlODkzYjQ4MS0zMDk4LTQwOWItYjAwNi1mNjA1NjEwYzc4MDYiLCJleHAiOjE3ODU1MzI4MTJ9.yeMTyiHtupYrfNqZLT7LOD_IXu3sQ0D_7ettrAhHVWE', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'id': 'e893b481-3098-409b-b006-f605610c7806', 'email': 'test_3c173ab3@oto.com', 'full_name': 'Reg Test'}} and 'test_3c173ab3@oto.com' == 'TEST_3c173ab3@oto.com' E E - TEST_3c173ab3@oto.com E ? ^^^^ E + test_3c173ab3@oto.com E ? ^^^^)
